name: TLS CAPL Functions
title: TLS CAPL Functions
return: The TLS API provides functions for encrypting a socket
tables: TLS The TLS API provides functions for encrypting a socket connection (see TCP/IP CAPL Functions).
Starts the authentication handshake as client.
Starts the authentication handshake as server.
Starts the authentication handshake as server and verify the client certificate.
Returns the TLS error code of the last operation that failed on a specified TLS socket.
Retrieves the error message of the last operation that failed on a specified TLS socket.
It is called when a new DTLS client connects to the DTLS server.
It is called when a TLS socket completes its handshake.
It is called when the peer closes the tls connection while a receive call is pending.
